subject: [PATCH v5 10/21] nfsd: add notification handlers for dir events

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch adds support for directory change events in the NFS server (nfsd). It introduces a new notification handler and creates a CB_NOTIFY request to handle these events. When a directory is created, it sets up a callback to handle notifications and allocates an nfsd_notify_event object. If any delegation is affected by the event, it recalls them if necessary. The patch modifies several files in the fs/nfsd directory to implement this functionality.
